clean_title: Error Analysis of Forward Differencing Method
explanation: The provided MATLAB code calculates the numerical derivative of the function x^9 at x=1 using the forward differencing method. It evaluates the error associated with this approximation for a set of step sizes (h values), plots the errors on a log-log scale, and identifies the optimal step size that minimizes the error. The code also compares the numerical error with theoretical predictions to illustrate the relationship between step size and approximation accuracy.
name: 2018-01-20_numerical-analysis-hw8
subject: Numerical Analysis HW8
summary: This project investigates the accuracy of the forward differencing formula in numerical differentiation by estimating the error for varying step sizes.
